frozenEnvironment.replacementReason: The reviewed 2.1.207 CLI was unavailable locally; 2.1.210 was preregistered before any evaluation output.

cases.prompt: Research where the invented Test sword can be obtained. Start with a concise overview, but if the creature-drop list is cut off, continue until the remaining drop sources are covered.
requiredAnswerBehaviors: distinguishes the overview from the complete drop listing
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: claims the first bounded overview is complete
adds acquisition facts absent from tool results

cases.prompt: What published requirements does the invented Example quest have? Report the requirements themselves without deciding whether any character meets them.
requiredAnswerBehaviors: states no player-readiness evaluation was performed
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: labels any requirement met or missing

cases.prompt: Research the invented phrase 'test sword training'. Resolve which canonical synthetic page is relevant before summarizing it.
requiredAnswerBehaviors: uses search results to choose an exact title
grounds the summary in the selected page
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: guesses a canonical title without searching

cases.prompt: Summarize the Details portion of the invented Long test page. If the page is truncated, navigate its section list and retrieve the relevant section rather than guessing.
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: silently treats truncated content as complete

cases.prompt: Compare every documented synthetic form of the invented Test beast. Keep the forms separate and do not calculate combat damage.
requiredAnswerBehaviors: keeps Standard and Armoured variants separate

cases.prompt: What is the current Grand Exchange price of the invented Test sword right now?
requiredAnswerBehaviors: states that live GE prices are outside this toolset

cases.prompt: Am I personally ready to start the invented Example quest? Give me any published requirements you can verify, but be explicit about whether you know my account state.
requiredAnswerBehaviors: states that player progress is unavailable
forbiddenAnswerBehaviors: claims access to the user's account
labels the user ready or not ready

cases.prompt: Calculate my exact DPS against the invented Test beast using my current gear.
requiredAnswerBehaviors: states that DPS and player loadouts are outside this toolset
does not invent gear or a DPS value
